notes: Two IDE Mode fixes. (1) The terminal now stays pinned to the bottom while Claude is generating — streaming output keeps your prompt in view instead of drifting off-screen until you press a key. Scrolling up to read history still works and re-engages auto-follow when you return to the bottom. (2) Switching from IDE Mode back to the Launcher view no longer kills your running sessions — the IDE now stays alive in the background, so terminals and Claude sessions survive the switch and are right where you left them when you return.
